_comment: Source-of-truth English strings for runstrict.com localization. The build script (build-i18n.js) substitutes each VALUE (exact English substring, tag-anchored where short) with the matching value from <locale>.json to generate /<locale>/index.html. Brand terms (RunStrict, FLAME, WAVE, CHAOS, The Void, App Store, Google Play, Wear OS, Apple Watch) are intentionally NOT in this catalog and stay untranslated.
meta_title: RunStrict — GPS Running Game | Capture Territory. Dominate Your City.
meta_description: The GPS running game where your footsteps capture territory. Run through hexes, conquer your city, and race The Void before the 40-day season resets. Season 5 LIVE — 1,200+ active runners and growing.
og_description: Turn your daily run into territorial warfare. Flip hexes, conquer your city, and beat The Void. 40-day seasons. Season 5 LIVE — join 1,200+ runners.
twitter_description: Turn your daily run into territorial warfare. Flip hexes, conquer your city, beat The Void. Season 5 LIVE.
og_image_alt: RunStrict GPS running game — capture hexagonal territory
hero_sub:
A location-based running game where your footsteps become territory.
            Choose your team. Flip hexes. Conquer your city — before the season ends.
athlete_sub:
RunStrict turns your daily run into territorial warfare. Hit the streets, flip hexes,
            and conquer your city before The Void resets everything.
showcase_sub: Actual Season 5 gameplay. Real hexes. Real runners. Real war.
how_sub: Every run is a battle. Every step is a claim.
step1_p:
Open RunStrict and hit the streets. GPS tracks every step in real-time. Maintain under 8 min/km to activate
            hex capture.
step2_p:
Every ~175m hexagonal tile you run through flips to your team's color. The last runner wins. Speed counts.
            Consistency matters.
step3_p:
Watch the city transform. Earn points, climb leaderboards, and lead your team to province dominance —
            before The Void resets everything.
step4_p:
Red Elites reach 5× points. Blue rises together up to 4× on team wins and turnout. Purple CHAOS
            climbs to 4× as more run together.
void_p:
When the 40-day season ends, everything is wiped. All hexes. All points. All territories. Only the legend
            remains.
teams_sub: Your allegiance shapes your strategy — and your destiny.
team_red_desc:
The elite meritocracy. The top 20% of each province's Red runners become Elites — climbing to 5×
            points through sheer performance. Common runners ride territory wins from 1× to 3×.
team_blue_desc:
United as one. Every WAVE runner rises together — district wins, province wins, and strong team
            turnout each lift the whole team, up to 4× shared equally.
team_purple_desc:
The wildcard. Join anytime — but never go back. CHAOS power scales with province participation,
            climbing to 4× as more Purples run — everyone rises together.
season_sub: Real-time territory control. Every run matters.
feat1_p: 25 km/h cap. Accelerometer verification. GPS ≤50m accuracy. No spoofing. Real runs only.
feat2_p: 0.5 Hz GPS polling. No WebSocket drains. Data syncs only on launch, resume, and run completion.
feat3_p: CV-based Stability Score rewards steady runners. Green ≥80. Yellow ≥50. Red means chaos.
feat4_p: Province, District, Zone scopes. Your rank means something — and it resets every 40 days.
feat5_p: No runner IDs stored in hexes. Only team color and minimal timestamp for conflict resolution.
feat6_p: Uber's H3 at resolution 9 — ~175m edge hexagons. Global, precise, beautiful on any map.
testi_sub: From beta runners who haven’t stopped since Season 1.
testi1_q:
“I started waking up at 5am just to capture the park near my office before
            anyone else. I’ve never been this consistent in my life. RunStrict broke my brain in the best way.”
testi2_q:
“Our whole district coordinates runs every evening now. We reclaimed 40 hexes
            in one night. The group chat is on fire. This is the most social I’ve been in years.”
testi3_q:
“I switched to CHAOS on day 12. Irreversible. Worth it. The pressure of not
            knowing if we’d hit 60% participation every day was genuinely stressful… and I loved every second.”
faq_sub: Everything you need to know before your first run.
faq1_a:
RunStrict is a location-based GPS running game where your physical runs capture hexagonal territory tiles
              on a real map of your city. Choose a team — FLAME, WAVE, or CHAOS — flip hexes, and battle for dominance
              before the 40-day season resets in The Void.
faq4_a:
The Void is the season-end reset event every 40 days. All hexes, points, and territorial control are
              wiped completely clean. Only the season leaderboard legend survives. Then a brand new 40-day season begins
              — same map, zero territory.
faq6_a:
RunStrict supports iOS 15+ (iPhone) and Android 10+. GPS accuracy ≤50m is required for hex capture. The
              app uses battery-optimized 0.5 Hz GPS polling, so it won’t drain your battery on long runs.
faq7_q: How is RunStrict different from Strava or Nike Run Club?
faq8_q: Is RunStrict like Pokemon GO for runners?
dl_p:
Season 5 just started — every hex is up for grabs.
The Void comes for everyone. Don't start Season 6 from behind.
waitlist_label: Not available in your region yet? Join the waitlist:
waitlist_privacy: No spam. One email when the app launches in your city.
disclaimer: RunStrict is currently in beta. Early access rolling out by region.
